decisions.decision: Flat HTML files at root (index.html, research.html...)
decisions.rationale: Simpler than subdirectory convention for 5 pages
Single source of truth for nav; avoids copy-paste maintenance trap
No external CDN dependency, no layout shift, academic typographic feel

decisions.decision: Josh W. Comeau CSS reset inlined in style.css
decisions.rationale: Current (March 2025), no npm install, addresses real cross-browser issues

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 1 in a fresh context window
context_notes: Project was fully initialized (PROJECT.md, config, research, REQUIREMENTS.md, ROADMAP.md) and Phase 1 was planned and verified. 2 plans, 2 waves. Ready to execute. Context exhausted before execution could begin.
